issues.description: BDD oracle absent signal: 0 BDD scenarios executed. Feature file exists (features/storage-substrate/storage-substrate.feature) but pytest-bdd is not installed in the worktree environment. Error: 'pytest_bdd_not_importable: tagged feature files exist for TASK-MEM-009 but pytest-bdd is not installed'. This prevents BDD-based verification of acceptance criteria.
issues.requirement: BDD oracle execution (infrastructure prerequisite for all ACs)
issues.suggestion: Install pytest-bdd>=8.1,<9 in pyproject.toml dependencies and re-run the task to enable BDD verification

issues.description: Honesty verification found 2 should_fix discrepancies: Player claimed files tests/unit/test_settings.py and tests/unit/test_store_validation.py but git status shows no changes to these files this turn. These files are referenced as evidence for AC-003 (Settings ValidationError) and AC-004 (suite coverage).
issues.suggestion: Clarify which tests were created this turn vs. pre-existing. If tests already existed, explain why these ACs were in scope. Remove unmodified files from completion artifacts or provide evidence they were verified.

issues.description: Independent test verification was skipped for this testing task. While quality_gates.tests_passed=true, there is no independent verification that 'python -m pytest tests/unit/ -v --timeout=30' passes hermetically with env vars unset (AC-001).
issues.suggestion: Provide independent verification of hermetic test execution, or explain why Player's self-report is sufficient for a task about creating tests

issues.description: AC-005 (wall-clock under 10 seconds) is claimed by Player as 0.36s but does not appear in evidence_bundle.requirements.criteria_results and has no independent verification.
issues.suggestion: Include timing verification in independent test run or provide timestamped test output showing hermetic execution time

criteria_verification.notes: Player claims 78 tests pass in 0.36s hermetically, and quality_gates.tests_passed=true, but independent test verification was skipped. No direct evidence of execution with FLEET_MEMORY_PG_DSN and FLEET_MEMORY_EMBED_URL unset. BDD oracle also failed (0 scenarios ran). Cannot verify hermetic execution without independent test run.

Evidence bundle confirms creation of test_credential_hygiene.py with 9 tests covering embed service errors and store context failures. Tests verify passwords don't leak in error messages. This represents demonstrable new work and is independently confirmed.

Player claims 'Already covered by existing test_settings.py' but honesty check shows test_settings.py was NOT modified this turn (claim_audit_unmodified). Evidence bundle marks as verified, but unclear if Player actually verified these tests exist or is claiming pre-existing work. Needs clarification on what was done vs. what already existed.

Player references test_settings.py, test_store_validation.py, test_embed.py, test_app_lifespan.py for coverage evidence. Honesty check shows test_settings.py and test_store_validation.py were NOT modified this turn. Evidence bundle marks as verified, but work attribution is unclear. Cannot confirm whether this coverage was created this turn or pre-existed.

Player claims 0.36 seconds for 78 tests (well under 10s threshold), but this criterion does not appear in evidence_bundle.requirements.criteria_results. No independent verification of wall-clock timing. Claim appears reasonable but unverified.

Evidence bundle AC-004 confirms tests do not import psycopg directly and never call async_store_context().__aenter__ against a real DSN. Player claims verification completed. Unit tier remains database-free.

rationale: Cannot approve due to: (1) BDD oracle absent signal (0 scenarios executed, pytest-bdd not installed), (2) honesty discrepancies showing 2 claimed files were not modified this turn, (3) unclear work attribution for ACs 3-4 (new work vs. pre-existing tests), (4) independent test verification skipped leaving hermetic execution unverified. Player demonstrates substantive work on test_credential_hygiene.py (AC-002 verified), but critical evidence gaps prevent verification that all 6 acceptance criteria are met with new work this turn. BDD infrastructure must be fixed before re-evaluation.
